data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'parts deposit if special order', but the evidence does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the use case mentions a parts deposit, there is no concrete evidence of the parts ordering process or the specific handling of special orders. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for a parts deposit, as it is not explicitly demonstrated in the provided data.
gaps: No evidence of the parts ordering process or confirmation of a parts deposit for special orders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for parts deposit handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a parts deposit is collected when a special order is placed.
